name: gbfs-audit-catalogue
title: GBFS Audit Catalogue
description: A certified, anomaly-flagged reference dataset of 46,307 bike-sharing stations across 123 French operators, with per-row audit verdicts (seven data-quality classes A1–A7) and contextual enrichment from INSEE, BAAC, BD TOPO, BD ALTI and the national GTFS aggregator.

fields.name: uid
fields.description: Audit Catalogue primary key (stable per certified station).

fields.name: system_id
fields.description: Operator-system identifier.

fields.name: city
fields.description: Normalised city name.

fields.name: system_name
fields.description: Operator-system label as published in the feed.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Feed URL or canonical-catalogue source pointer.

fields.name: station_id
fields.description: GBFS native station identifier.

fields.name: station_name
fields.description: GBFS station name.

fields.name: lat
fields.description: Geofiltered WGS84 latitude (decimal degrees).

fields.name: lon
fields.description: Geofiltered WGS84 longitude (decimal degrees).

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: Raw declared dock capacity (may be a placeholder or null).

fields.name: address
fields.description: GBFS-declared street address, when present.

fields.name: region_id
fields.description: Administrative region identifier, when present.

fields.name: n_stations_system
fields.description: Total number of stations in the parent system.

fields.name: fetched_at
fields.description: UTC timestamp of the audited feed snapshot.

fields.name: elevation_m
fields.description: Ground elevation in metres (IGN BD ALTI).

fields.name: topography_roughness_index
fields.description: Local relief amplitude around the station.

fields.name: infra_cyclable_km
fields.description: Cycle-lane linear within a 300 m buffer (IGN BD TOPO), km.

fields.name: infra_cyclable_pct
fields.description: Share of dedicated cycle right-of-way in the buffer.

fields.name: baac_accidents_cyclistes
fields.description: Severe cyclist-crash count within 500 m over 5 years (ONISR BAAC).

fields.name: gtfs_heavy_stops_300m
fields.description: Heavy-transit stops within 300 m (national GTFS aggregator).

fields.name: gtfs_stops_within_300m_pct
fields.description: Share of accessible heavy-transit stops in the buffer.

fields.name: code_commune
fields.description: INSEE commune code.

fields.name: commune_name
fields.description: INSEE commune label.

fields.name: revenu_median_uc
fields.description: INSEE Filosofi median disposable income per consumption unit.

fields.name: gini_revenu
fields.description: Local Gini index of income.

fields.name: revenu_d1
fields.description: First-decile income (INSEE Filosofi).

fields.name: ecart_interquar
fields.description: Interquartile income spread (INSEE Filosofi).

fields.name: part_menages_voit0
fields.description: Share of car-less households (INSEE).

fields.name: part_velo_travail
fields.description: Share of commuting by bicycle (INSEE).

fields.name: station_type
fields.description: Audited station type: docked_bike, free_floating or carsharing.

fields.name: capacity_raw
fields.description: Raw GBFS capacity preserved verbatim (NaN/placeholders kept).

fields.name: capacity_audited
fields.description: Post-audit capacity; NaN for non-dock types.

fields.name: flag_A1
fields.description: Structural error A1: out-of-domain inclusion (carsharing under a bike schema).

fields.name: flag_A2
fields.description: Structural error A2: placeholder capacity constant across a system.

fields.name: flag_A3
fields.description: Structural error A3: structural over-capacity (free-floating anchor).

fields.name: flag_A4
fields.description: Structural error A4: topology-aware geospatial outlier (HDBSCAN + spectral).

fields.name: flag_A5
fields.description: Structural error A5: out-of-perimeter coverage (bbox > 50,000 km²).

fields.name: flag_A6
fields.description: Semantic warning A6: zero-capacity dock.

fields.name: flag_A7
fields.description: Semantic warning A7: null-capacity field.

fields.name: operator_name
fields.description: Normalised operator label.

fields.name: audit_confidence
fields.description: Per-row audit confidence: high, medium or low.

fields.name: dist_to_nearest_station_m
fields.description: Intra-system distance to nearest station (metres).

fields.name: n_stations_within_500m
fields.description: Intra-system station count within 500 m.

fields.name: n_stations_within_1km
fields.description: Intra-system station count within 1 km.

fields.name: nearest_system_dist_m
fields.description: Distance to the nearest station of a different system (metres).

fields.name: catchment_density_per_km2
fields.description: Stations per km² within a 1 km buffer.
